column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Sleeping peacefully on the veranda (engawa)" | TEXT="すやすや" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Waking up, rubbing eyes" | TEXT="んっ？" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Yawning delicately" | TEXT="ふわぁ…" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching arms out on the veranda" | TEXT="よく寝た" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting on veranda, feeling the breeze" | TEXT="ぽかぽかする" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at a sleeping cat next to her" | TEXT="可愛いね" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Resting head on knees" | TEXT="のどか" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling softly at the garden" | TEXT="癒されます" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Leaning against a pillar drowsily" | TEXT="うとうと"
